Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT pl.slug, pl.parent_id, pl.sort_order, plt.label, pg.slug as group_slug FROM pos_labels pl LEFT JOIN pos_label_translations plt ON pl.id = plt.pos_id AND plt.language_id = 1 LEFT JOIN pos_groups pg ON pl.group_id = pg.id ORDER BY pl.parent_id NULLS FIRST, pl.sort_order;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -h 127.0.0.1 -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_senses, COUNT\(formula\) as has_formula, COUNT\(usage_note\) as has_usage_note, COUNT\(learner_traps\) as has_learner_traps FROM word_senses;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -h 127.0.0.1 -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_defs, COUNT\(formula\) as has_formula, COUNT\(usage_note\) as has_usage_note FROM word_sense_definitions;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -h 127.0.0.1 -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT l.code, COUNT\(*\) as total, COUNT\(wsn.formula\) as has_formula, COUNT\(wsn.usage_note\) as has_usage_note, COUNT\(wsn.learner_traps\) as has_learner_traps FROM word_sense_notes wsn JOIN languages l ON l.id = wsn.language_id GROUP BY l.code;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -h 127.0.0.1 -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as senses_without_notes FROM word_senses ws WHERE NOT EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM word_sense_notes wsn WHERE wsn.word_sense_id = ws.id\);")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -h 127.0.0.1 -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT ws.id, ws.formula as ws_formula, wsn.formula as notes_formula, l.code FROM word_senses ws JOIN word_sense_notes wsn ON wsn.word_sense_id = ws.id JOIN languages l ON l.id = wsn.language_id WHERE ws.formula IS NOT NULL AND wsn.formula IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -h 127.0.0.1 -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT wsd.id, wsd.word_sense_id, l.code, wsd.formula as def_formula, ws.formula as sense_formula FROM word_sense_definitions wsd JOIN word_senses ws ON ws.id = wsd.word_sense_id JOIN languages l ON l.id = wsd.language_id WHERE wsd.formula IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT id, pronunciation_text, has_audio FROM word_pronunciations WHERE word_object_id = \(SELECT id FROM word_objects WHERE smart_id = 'u6d41_u52d5'\);")
Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT id, has_audio FROM word_sense_examples WHERE chinese_text LIKE '%配合%' LIMIT 2;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT ws.id, ws.enriched_by, ws.enriched_at, ws.intensity, ws.semantic_mode_id, ws.connotation_id, ws.updated_at FROM word_senses ws JOIN word_objects wo ON wo.id=ws.word_object_id WHERE wo.traditional='迷戀';")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT a.slug, d.slug, COUNT\(ws.id\) AS usage FROM attributes a JOIN designations d ON d.attribute_id=a.id LEFT JOIN word_senses ws ON \(ws.semantic_mode_id=d.id OR ws.dimension_id=d.id\) WHERE a.slug IN \('semantic-mode','dimension'\) GROUP BY a.slug, d.slug ORDER BY a.slug, usage DESC;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT a.slug AS attr, d.slug AS desig FROM attributes a JOIN designations d ON d.attribute_id=a.id WHERE a.slug IN \('semantic-mode','dimension'\) ORDER BY a.slug, d.slug;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT d.slug, COUNT\(ws.id\) FROM designations d JOIN attributes a ON a.id=d.attribute_id LEFT JOIN word_senses ws ON ws.semantic_mode_id=d.id WHERE a.slug='semantic-mode' GROUP BY d.slug ORDER BY COUNT DESC;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT id, LEFT\(chinese_text,60\), LEFT\(english_text,60\) FROM word_sense_examples WHERE word_sense_id=10119;")
Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT from_sense_id, to_sense_id, relation_type_id FROM word_sense_relations WHERE from_sense_id=10119;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT a.slug, a.multi_select FROM attributes a WHERE a.slug IN \('dimension','register','channel','connotation','semantic-mode','sensitivity'\);")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT a.slug, a.is_multi_select FROM attributes a WHERE a.slug IN \('dimension','register','channel','connotation','semantic-mode','sensitivity','intensity'\);")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT wsd.word_sense_id, d.slug, a.slug AS attr FROM word_sense_designations wsd JOIN designations d ON d.id=wsd.designation_id JOIN attributes a ON a.id=d.attribute_id WHERE a.slug='dimension' LIMIT 15;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT word_sense_id\) AS senses_with_dim, COUNT\(*\) AS total_rows FROM word_sense_designations wsd JOIN designations d ON d.id=wsd.designation_id JOIN attributes a ON a.id=d.attribute_id WHERE a.slug='dimension';")
Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT slug FROM attributes WHERE slug='semantic-mode';")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT ws.id, ws.intensity, ws.enriched_by, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM word_sense_definitions WHERE word_sense_id=ws.id\) defs, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM word_sense_examples WHERE word_sense_id=ws.id\) exs, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM word_sense_relations WHERE word_sense_id=ws.id\) rels, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM word_sense_collocations WHERE word_sense_id=ws.id\) colls, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM word_sense_notes WHERE word_sense_id=ws.id\) notes FROM word_senses ws JOIN word_objects wo ON wo.id=ws.word_object_id WHERE wo.traditional='迷戀';")
Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name LIKE '%translation%';")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS total, COUNT\(DISTINCT example_id\) AS unique_examples FROM word_sense_example_translations;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS translation_rows, COUNT\(DISTINCT word_sense_example_id\) AS unique_examples FROM word_sense_example_translations;")
Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM word_sense_examples WHERE english_text IS NOT NULL AND english_text != '';")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT ws.id, ws.source, ws.tocfl_level_id, ws.hsk_level_id, t.slug AS tocfl, h.slug AS hsk FROM word_senses ws LEFT JOIN designations t ON t.id=ws.tocfl_level_id LEFT JOIN designations h ON h.id=ws.hsk_level_id WHERE ws.id=10119;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT 'pos_pivot' AS kind, COUNT\(*\) FROM word_sense_pos WHERE word_sense_id=10119 UNION ALL SELECT 'definitions', COUNT\(*\) FROM word_sense_definitions WHERE word_sense_id=10119;")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/Cellar/postgresql@18/18.3/bin/psql -U huggernaut -d huggernaut -c "SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email FROM users u WHERE u.name ILIKE '%shifu%' OR u.email ILIKE '%shifu%';")
